decisions.rationale: Observation matches its own base_record_id corridor_first-second-avenues-brt exactly: both describe the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS corridor in Manhattan from South Ferry to 125th Street, sourced from the same 2010-01-14 CAC meeting presentation. The evidence blocks p002_c0001 ('First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS' heading) and p035_c0004 (map caption describing 'the proposed SBS corridor along the East River, running from South Ferry to 125th Street') confirm the corridor identity. The registry record already lists this source and aliases such as corridor_first-second-ave-sbs. No different existing record matches more closely.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The map illustrates the proposed SBS corridor along the East River, running from South Ferry to 125th Street.
